creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
Created attachment 202597
Patch against /usr/ports

> commit 212a144064d18a9fba1953b28782c83c0c0c3397 (HEAD -> dev, origin/dev)
> Author: Michael Osipov <michael.osipov@siemens.com>
> Date:   2019-03-05 13:56:48 +0100
> 
>     devel/websvn: update port to 2.4
> 
>     * Update port to new location on GitHub
>     * Properly depend on Subversion and PEAR packages
>     * Change maintainer to WebSVN committer

I am a committer of the project hosted on GitHub now and also a happy FreeBSD user. I'd like to take ownership of the port of the current portmaintainer agrees.
